text: Here, the cold gleam of blue and violet lights fills an empty, industrial space with an alien quality. I feel detached, as though I am experiencing the environment through a filter of contemplation and distance. The silence of the place amplifies my awareness of presence and absence, of potential and emptiness. Each element—glass, reflection, fluorescent glow—prompts me to wonder: what does it mean for a place to wait, quietly, for purpose or human company?
